sql:
CREATE TABLE "MediaItems" (
	"uuid" text PRIMARY KEY UNIQUE,
	"type" text DEFAULT 'MediaItem' NOT NULL,
	"outlineGradient" text DEFAULT 'ring-[#C2381D]' NOT NULL,
	"loaded" boolean DEFAULT false NOT NULL,
	"local" text DEFAULT '' NOT NULL
);

CREATE TABLE "OriginalItems" (
	"id" serial PRIMARY KEY,
	"parentId" text NOT NULL,
	"serverId" text NOT NULL,
	"uuid" text NOT NULL,
	"url" text NOT NULL
);
CREATE INDEX "ContentToItemId_idx" ON "ContentItems" ("parentId");
CREATE INDEX "ImageProviderId_idx" ON "ImageItems" ("serverId");
CREATE INDEX "ParentsToChildrenParentId_idx" ON "MediaItemChildren" ("parentId");
CREATE INDEX "ParentsToChildrenChildId_idx" ON "MediaItemChildren" ("childId");
CREATE INDEX "ParentsToChildrenCompositeId_idx" ON "MediaItemChildren" ("parentId","childId");
CREATE INDEX "ItemToImagesItemID_idx" ON "MediaItemToImageItem" ("mediaItemId");
CREATE INDEX "ItemToImagesImageID_idx" ON "MediaItemToImageItem" ("imageItemId");
CREATE INDEX "ItemToImagesCompositeID_idx" ON "MediaItemToImageItem" ("mediaItemId","imageItemId");
CREATE INDEX "ItemToProvidersItemId_idx" ON "ProviderItemToImageItem" ("mediaItemId");
CREATE INDEX "ItemToProvidersProviderId_idx" ON "ProviderItemToImageItem" ("providerItemId");
CREATE INDEX "ItemToProvidersCompositeId_idx" ON "ProviderItemToImageItem" ("mediaItemId","providerItemId");
CREATE INDEX "OrignalToItemId_idx" ON "OriginalItems" ("parentId");
ALTER TABLE "MediaItemChildren" ADD CONSTRAINT "MediaItemChildren_parentId_MediaItems_uuid_fkey" FOREIGN KEY ("parentId") REFERENCES "MediaItems"("uuid");
ALTER TABLE "MediaItemChildren" ADD CONSTRAINT "MediaItemChildren_childId_MediaItems_uuid_fkey" FOREIGN KEY ("childId") REFERENCES "MediaItems"("uuid");
ALTER TABLE "MediaItemToImageItem" ADD CONSTRAINT "MediaItemToImageItem_mediaItemId_MediaItems_uuid_fkey" FOREIGN KEY ("mediaItemId") REFERENCES "MediaItems"("uuid");
ALTER TABLE "MediaItemToImageItem" ADD CONSTRAINT "MediaItemToImageItem_imageItemId_ImageItems_url_fkey" FOREIGN KEY ("imageItemId") REFERENCES "ImageItems"("url");
ALTER TABLE "ProviderItemToImageItem" ADD CONSTRAINT "ProviderItemToImageItem_mediaItemId_MediaItems_uuid_fkey" FOREIGN KEY ("mediaItemId") REFERENCES "MediaItems"("uuid");
ALTER TABLE "ProviderItemToImageItem" ADD CONSTRAINT "ProviderItemToImageItem_WHTl5eN0AHNE_fkey" FOREIGN KEY ("providerItemId") REFERENCES "ProviderItems"("userId");
